themes.label: Creation
themes.summary: This chapter underscores creation, the heavens and earth, or God’s creative ordering work. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 21 verses. Commentary leans on "Overlaying involved beating thin sheets of gold to cover the entire surface of each board, a...". Word-study detail reinforces "עָשָׂה֙: made - to do or make, in the broadest sense and widest application".

themes.label: Wisdom
themes.summary: This chapter points toward wisdom, understanding, discernment, counsel, or instruction. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "The chapter opens with 'Then wrought Bezaleel and Aholiab'—moving from calling (ch. 35) to wo...". Word-study detail reinforces "חָכְמָ֤ה: wisdom - wisdom (in a good sense)".
